readings.Aries: What you call impatience is actually high sensitivity to wasted potential. Channel it. Simpler is correct here.
readings.Taurus: You have been generous with your time. You are allowed to reclaim some of it. You already have what you need to take the next step.
readings.Gemini: Two conversations are happening simultaneously and you're keeping both alive when one needs to end. Sleep on it before committing.
readings.Cancer: Something is about to feel better. Not because anything changed — because the feeling has run its course. Something you've been measuring incorrectly just corrected itself.
readings.Leo: You are visible whether you try to be or not. Make what you're broadcasting intentional. Something small done consistently has more effect than something large done once.
readings.Virgo: Your care for the people around you is expressed in actions, not words. Make sure they know it. The week ahead rewards preparation you can still do today.
readings.Libra: There is indecision, and then there is gathering information. Know which you're doing. There's more support available than you've asked for.
readings.Scorpio: The investigation you're conducting on someone else — conduct it on yourself for a day. Someone you haven't thought of lately is relevant to this.
readings.Sagittarius: Your honesty is a gift. Right now it needs better packaging. Make contact with the actual person rather than the version in your head.
readings.Capricorn: There is warmth in you that your efficiency sometimes buries. Let it surface. Let this one be easy.
readings.Aquarius: Your originality is not a strategy — it's your nature. Trust it even when it confuses people. Someone you haven't thought of lately is relevant to this.
readings.Pisces: You've been in someone else's current for a while. Find your own direction. The week ahead rewards preparation you can still do today.

Aries-Aries.synthesis: Together you are louder, brighter, and harder to ignore. Whether that's what you need is a different question.

Aries-Taurus.synthesis: The slow materials and the fast energy can build something neither could alone. Patience is required from the fire.

Aries-Gemini.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Aries-Cancer.synthesis: You are changed by proximity to each other. This is not neutral, and it was never going to be.

Aries-Leo.synthesis: Together you are louder, brighter, and harder to ignore. Whether that's what you need is a different question.

Aries-Virgo.synthesis: You work well when one agrees to be the foundation and the other agrees to be the spark. Agreement is the hard part.

Aries-Libra.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Aries-Scorpio.synthesis: The attraction was always obvious. The sustainability is the question neither of you has fully answered.

Aries-Sagittarius.synthesis: There is enough heat between you to forge something remarkable or burn it all down. Usually both.

Aries-Capricorn.synthesis: You work well when one agrees to be the foundation and the other agrees to be the spark. Agreement is the hard part.

Aries-Aquarius.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Aries-Pisces.synthesis: You are changed by proximity to each other. This is not neutral, and it was never going to be.

Taurus-Taurus.synthesis: You recognise each other's methods. Whether that familiarity breeds trust or contempt is up to you.

Taurus-Gemini.synthesis: What you bring each other is exactly what the other struggles to generate alone. This should be easy. It isn't.

Taurus-Cancer.synthesis: The stability and the depth work well together — until they work too well and nobody grows.

Taurus-Leo.synthesis: Something transformative is possible here — if neither of you insists on doing it alone.

Taurus-Virgo.synthesis: You anchor each other well. Make sure neither of you has quietly agreed to stop moving entirely.

Taurus-Libra.synthesis: One of you is always explaining why it should move. One of you is quietly proving why it works as it is.

Taurus-Scorpio.synthesis: This tends to become quietly necessary to both people before either admits it.

Taurus-Sagittarius.synthesis: In theory you stabilise each other. In practice, one of you always feels slightly extinguished.

Taurus-Capricorn.synthesis: The practical language between you is fluent and efficient. The emotional one takes more effort from both.

Taurus-Aquarius.synthesis: You need each other more than you'll admit, and you both demonstrate this through argument.

Taurus-Pisces.synthesis: The support here is genuine and sometimes suffocating. The line between them is worth watching.

Gemini-Gemini.synthesis: You're rarely bored together. Occasionally you're frustrated by the inability to just be still.

Gemini-Cancer.synthesis: You reach each other through completely different routes. The meeting place is interesting and unstable.

Gemini-Leo.synthesis: You bring out ambition in each other. Whose ambition you're actually serving is a fair question.

Gemini-Virgo.synthesis: What you bring each other is exactly what the other struggles to generate alone. This should be easy. It isn't.

Gemini-Libra.synthesis: The conversation never stops. Decide if what you're talking around is more interesting than what you'd find if you arrived.

Gemini-Scorpio.synthesis: One of you explains. One of you feels. At some point the explaining stops helping.

Gemini-Sagittarius.synthesis: There's real joy between you when you're moving. The stillness is harder for both of you, and necessary.

Gemini-Capricorn.synthesis: The ideas need grounding. The ground needs ideas. Neither of you finds this as obvious as it sounds.

Gemini-Aquarius.synthesis: The ideas between you breed more ideas. At some point one of them needs to become something real.

Gemini-Pisces.synthesis: You make each other think differently — one about the world, one about themselves. That's not nothing.

Cancer-Cancer.synthesis: The emotional fluency here is extraordinary. The risk is drowning in it before finding solid ground.

Cancer-Leo.synthesis: You challenge each other's default mode — which is either exactly what you needed or what you weren't ready for.

Cancer-Virgo.synthesis: You care for each other in ways that are practical and non-intrusive. Neither says much. Both notice everything.

Cancer-Libra.synthesis: The emotional and the intellectual are in conversation here. When it works, it's singular. When it doesn't, it's lonely.

Cancer-Scorpio.synthesis: You both know how to hold pain without speaking. Decide if that's strength or evasion.

Cancer-Sagittarius.synthesis: You challenge each other's default mode — which is either exactly what you needed or what you weren't ready for.

Cancer-Capricorn.synthesis: The foundation feels natural because it is. What gets built on top of it requires more deliberate attention.

Cancer-Aquarius.synthesis: You make each other think differently — one about the world, one about themselves. That's not nothing.

Cancer-Pisces.synthesis: You see each other clearly enough to hurt each other precisely. That's not a warning. It's just the truth.

Leo-Leo.synthesis: There is enough heat between you to forge something remarkable or burn it all down. Usually both.

Leo-Virgo.synthesis: In theory you stabilise each other. In practice, one of you always feels slightly extinguished.

Leo-Libra.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Leo-Scorpio.synthesis: You challenge each other's default mode — which is either exactly what you needed or what you weren't ready for.

Leo-Sagittarius.synthesis: Neither of you knows how to be small around the other. Decide if that's exhilarating or just exhausting.

Leo-Capricorn.synthesis: There's something genuinely generative in the friction. Whether either of you can tolerate friction is the question.

Leo-Aquarius.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Leo-Pisces.synthesis: One of you runs toward; one guards the door. The dance is interesting until someone gets tired.

Virgo-Virgo.synthesis: You anchor each other well. Make sure neither of you has quietly agreed to stop moving entirely.

Virgo-Libra.synthesis: You complement each other in ways neither fully acknowledges. The acknowledgment is the missing piece.

Virgo-Scorpio.synthesis: You offer each other what you each struggle most to give yourself: one of you offers ground, one of you offers feeling.

Virgo-Sagittarius.synthesis: The slow materials and the fast energy can build something neither could alone. Patience is required from the fire.

Virgo-Capricorn.synthesis: Neither of you wastes anything. The question is whether you're saving the relationship or just managing it.

Virgo-Aquarius.synthesis: You need each other more than you'll admit, and you both demonstrate this through argument.

Virgo-Pisces.synthesis: One of you protects, one of you nourishes. At some point both of you need to be taken care of.

Libra-Libra.synthesis: You both live a little inside your heads. When you're together, the heads get very crowded.

Libra-Scorpio.synthesis: The emotional and the intellectual are in conversation here. When it works, it's singular. When it doesn't, it's lonely.

Libra-Sagittarius.synthesis: You're both good at starting things. One of you will have to become better at finishing them.

Libra-Capricorn.synthesis: One of you is always explaining why it should move. One of you is quietly proving why it works as it is.

Libra-Aquarius.synthesis: The ideas between you breed more ideas. At some point one of them needs to become something real.

Libra-Pisces.synthesis: The connection is real and confusing to both of you. You're not sure how it works. It works anyway.

Scorpio-Scorpio.synthesis: Nobody outside this pairing fully understands what happens inside it. That's exactly how you want it.

Scorpio-Sagittarius.synthesis: You challenge each other's default mode — which is either exactly what you needed or what you weren't ready for.

Scorpio-Capricorn.synthesis: You care for each other in ways that are practical and non-intrusive. Neither says much. Both notice everything.

Scorpio-Aquarius.synthesis: The connection is real and confusing to both of you. You're not sure how it works. It works anyway.

Scorpio-Pisces.synthesis: You absorb each other's moods completely. Make sure the current is flowing in a direction you chose.

Sagittarius-Sagittarius.synthesis: You give each other permission to be more yourselves. Sometimes that permission is exactly the problem.

Sagittarius-Capricorn.synthesis: You work well when one agrees to be the foundation and the other agrees to be the spark. Agreement is the hard part.

Sagittarius-Aquarius.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Sagittarius-Pisces.synthesis: You challenge each other's default mode — which is either exactly what you needed or what you weren't ready for.

Capricorn-Capricorn.synthesis: You build things that last. The slower the construction, the less you talk about what might be missing.

Capricorn-Aquarius.synthesis: You complement each other in ways neither fully acknowledges. The acknowledgment is the missing piece.

Capricorn-Pisces.synthesis: One of you protects, one of you nourishes. At some point both of you need to be taken care of.

Aquarius-Aquarius.synthesis: The ideas between you breed more ideas. At some point one of them needs to become something real.

Aquarius-Pisces.synthesis: You reach each other through completely different routes. The meeting place is interesting and unstable.

Pisces-Pisces.synthesis: The emotional fluency here is extraordinary. The risk is drowning in it before finding solid ground.

calculation_methods: Planetary longitudes: Jean Meeus 'Astronomical Algorithms' low-precision formulae (±1° accuracy)
Retrograde: computed from direction of longitude change vs previous day
Aspects: angular separation with standard orbs (conjunction 8°, sextile 6°, square/trine/opposition 8°, quincunx 3°)
Compatibility: element harmony base score + modality adjustment + date-seeded variance
Daily readings: deterministic date-seed (PRNG) selects from 60-entry per-sign pools + 30-entry suffix pool; 1,800 combinations per sign
